paragraph: Get clear, crisp treble notes and resounding deep bass tones with these earphones. Neodymium magnets and 30-millimeter drivers provide rich sound, and the cushioned ear cups keep you comfortable. These black Sony headphones have a tangle-resistant 3.9-foot cord to give you freedom of movement while listening.
bullets: Black over-ear headphones for rich sound reproduction
Wired over-ear form factor offers high-fidelity sound
Standard 3.5mm earphone plug works with almost every 3.5mm audio jack device
Finely tuned 30mm neodymium drivers combined with a closed-back acoustic system design
90-day manufacturer limited warranty
headliner: Enjoy impressive sound quality and long-term listening comfort with these cushioned Sony stereo over-ear headphones.
expandedDescr:
Realistic Sound
30mm diameter dynamic dome driver units in each cushioned ear cup of the Sony MDR-ZX110 Stereo Headphones produce sound with full bass, lively midrange, and clear highs. PET diaphragms in the closed-back on-ear design deliver an extended low frequency response of 12 to 22,000 Hz for realistic audio.

Convenient Comfort
Large cushioned ear cups make long listening sessions comfortable, while a unique swivel design enables the Sony MDR-ZX110 Stereo Headphones to fold for compact storage. The Flat-Y cable connecting the headphones to your device resists tangling.

Travel Friendly
These headphones don't need batteries or recharging to function, making them worry-free travel accessories. The 2.5mm audio jack on Sony MDR-ZX110 Stereo Headphones is compatible with mobile devices, computers, and USB devices alike.

Package Contents
Sony MDR-ZX110 Stereo Headphones in Black, and a limited 90-day warranty.
